allow: Bash(python -c "import yaml, sys; yaml.safe_load\(open\(sys.argv[1], encoding=''utf-8''\)\)" "/c/Projects/EV smart charging/.claude/worktrees/friendly-napier/packages/ev_ui_sensors.yaml")
Bash(for f in utils.py startup_monitor.py mode_resolver.py status_narrator.py chart_data_writer.py predictor.py apps.yaml)

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ls -la /config/packages/ev_ui_sensors.yaml && ha core check && ls /addon_configs/a0d7b954_appdaemon/apps/*.py | xargs -I{} basename {} && grep -E ''^ev_'' /addon_configs/a0d7b954_appdaemon/apps/apps.yaml")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "journalctl -u addon_a0d7b954_appdaemon --since ''5 minutes ago'' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -iE ''\(EVMode|EVStatus|EVChart|EVStartup|EVPredictor|error|warning|loaded|starting\)'' | tail -40")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>&1 | tail -60")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "grep -i ''session_monitor\\|EVSessionMonitor'' /addon_configs/a0d7b954_appdaemon/logs/appdaemon.log 2>/dev/null | tail -20 || echo ''No log entries found yet''")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ls -la /addon_configs/a0d7b954_appdaemon/logs/ 2>/dev/null && tail -50 /addon_configs/a0d7b954_appdaemon/logs/appdaemon.log 2>/dev/null || echo ''log not found''")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''session_monitor\\|EVSessionMonitor\\|error\\|Error'' | tail -30")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''EVSessionMonitor\\|initializ\\|ready\\|cycle_active'' | tail -20")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''session\\|monitor\\|Mode\\|resolver'' | tail -30")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>/dev/null | grep -i ''INFO\\|WARNING\\|ERROR'' | grep -v ''thread\\|state_changed\\|process_event\\|thread_async'' | tail -30")

Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon --follow=false 2>/dev/null | grep -E ''ev_session_monitor|EVSessionMonitor|ev_mode_resolver|EVModeResolver|initializ|ready|WARNING|ERROR'' | grep -v ''thread\\.'' | tail -30")
Bash(ssh -i ~/.ssh/homeassistant root@homeassistant.local "ha addons logs a0d7b954_appdaemon 2>/dev/null | grep -v DEBUG | tail -40")
